# ui.model_access { #app.ui.model_access }

`ui.model_access`

Model access layout views, R package vignettes, and citation components.

Constructs dedicated panels for documentation workflows, embedding localized 
vignette HTML files via iframe modules and parsing reference citations.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [citing_tab](#app.ui.model_access.citing_tab) | Build the citation view interface container. |
| [tools_tab](#app.ui.model_access.tools_tab) | Build the tooling resources layout tab view. |
| [vignettes_tab](#app.ui.model_access.vignettes_tab) | Build the standalone tab panel housing the complete package vignette collection. |

### citing_tab { #app.ui.model_access.citing_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.citing_tab()
```

Build the citation view interface container.

Pulls and renders markdown blocks stating data reuse rights, permissions,
and official project referencing guidelines.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                            |
|--------|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | NavPanel | A dedicated user interface tab wrapping formal citation documentation. |

### tools_tab { #app.ui.model_access.tools_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.tools_tab()
```

Build the tooling resources layout tab view.

Aggregates overall asset markdown guides and appends individual reference 
vignettes within a nested sub-navigation drop-down menu structure.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                            |
|--------|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | NavPanel | The constructed interface view holding available developer guidelines. |

### vignettes_tab { #app.ui.model_access.vignettes_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.vignettes_tab()
```

Build the standalone tab panel housing the complete package vignette collection.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                                  |
|--------|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | NavPanel | The completed user interface view wrapping structured package documentation. |
